title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Shaadi.com Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Shaadi.com Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shaadi.com Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shaadi.com Global Group:
Shaadi.com Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com Global Group!
